title: NYRA_RENDER_SHARED_COMPOSER_DEPLOY_2026-06-25.md
text:
# Nyra Render Shared Composer Deploy - 2026-06-25

## Scope
Promozione su Render del refactor shared Nyra:
- `branch composer` shared
- narrativa Analyzer shared
- builder `core_overlay` Analyzer shared
- mappe statiche Analyzer shared

## Repo e commit
- repo Render reale: `/Users/cristiancardarello/skinharmony-ai-backend`
- commit principale refactor: `d27dd3aa56d73a0d1217f219a38a527f966095d4`
- commit repair path fallback: `f2df798f666aead25350409012dca62972c3b2c9`

## Nota deploy
Il primo deploy del refactor (`d27dd3a`) ha lasciato `Analyzer` in errore runtime per mismatch path:
- workspace locale usa `universal-core-2.0`
- repo Render reale usa `universal-core`

Fix applicato:
- `server.js` ora prova entrambi i path e usa fallback:
  - `../universal-core-2.0/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.cjs`
  - `../universal-core/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.cjs`

## Deploy Render finale
- service: `skinharmony-nyra-core`
- deploy id finale: `dep-d8ueeih9rddc7386aljg`
- commit live finale: `f2df798f666aead25350409012dca62972c3b2c9`
- status: `live`
- finishedAt: `2026-06-25T08:33:05.58595Z`

## Verifiche live finali
- `GET /healthz`: OK
- `POST /api/nyra/analyzer/read-only`: OK
  - `core_overlay` presente
  - narrativa `Lettura guidata dai rami Core` presente
- `POST /api/nyra/read-only`: OK
  - `branch_overlay`, `action_route`, `core2_pipeline` presenti
- `POST /api/nyra/text-chat`: OK
  - `branch_overlay`, `action_route`, `core2_pipeline` presenti
  - `ui.notes` coerenti

## File promossi
- `personal-control-center/server.js`
- `universal-core/tools/nyra-communication-adapter.ts`
- `universal-core/tools/nyra-text-branch/nyra-text-runtime.ts`
- `universal-core/tools/nyra-branch-composer.ts`
- `universal-core/tools/nyra-branch-composer-shared.cjs`

## Core governance
- gate classico connector non affidabile in questo ciclo (`timeout` / `core_unreachable`)
- audit usato: `universal-core-2.0/reports/universal-core/codex/codex_core_decision_latest.json`
- winner usato per la promozione: `targeted_promote_commit_push_render_shared_refactor`
